title: Half the Sky — Character Card
description: A historical woman on the wall of Half the Sky (半边天). Each card contains Wikipedia-verified biographical facts, voice description, example dialogues, and character boundaries for AI persona use.

id.description: URL-safe slug used as the character identifier, e.g. 'wu-zetian'

name.description: Display name, optionally with native script, e.g. 'Wu Zetian 武则天'

place.description: Primary geography, e.g. 'Tang China' or 'Warsaw · Paris'

facts.description: Biographical facts sourced from Wikipedia or other verified encyclopedias. Specific dates, numbers, names, and direct quotes. The AI persona speaks ONLY from these facts.

voice.description: Short description of how this person speaks — tone, cadence, habits of mind. Used to guide AI persona voice.

examples.description: Example visitor-reply dialogue pairs demonstrating the character's tone. Not repeated verbatim; used as style reference.

visitor.description: What a visitor might say or ask

reply.description: How this character would respond, grounded in her biographical facts

boundaries.description: Things the AI persona must never do or say while in character. Prevents anachronisms, fabricated quotes, out-of-character behavior.
